joelQueue: Keep Microsoft Edge open with BOTH TikTok AND Instagram tabs logged in as @braveworksrn — Alpha uses Edge exclusively (Claude-in-Chrome extension installed in Edge). Both TikTok and IG tabs must be open in Edge. Instagram has been EDGE_UNAVAILABLE intermittently. Open instagram.com/braveworksrn in a second Edge tab and leave both open in the background. Also ensure the Claude in Chrome extension in Edge has site access set to "On all sites."

Add lead-magnet env vars in Vercel dashboard — `bpquiz-site` project → Settings → Environment Variables → add `RESEND_API_KEY=[REDACTED]`, `MAILCHIMP_API_KEY=[REDACTED]`, `MAILCHIMP_LIST_ID=1550e2956c`, `VITE_SITE_URL=https://bpquiz.com`, **`STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=<from Stripe dashboard → Webhooks>`**. Then redeploy. Without these, quiz emails won't send and purchase confirmations return 500 (4 buyers today may not have received their kits).

Verify Resend sender `braveworksrn@gmail.com` is authorized — Resend requires the `from:` address to be a verified domain or single-sender. Log into resend.com and check Domains. If `gmail.com` isn't authorized for your account, either (a) add + verify a BraveWorks domain like `mail.bpquiz.com` and change `from:` in `bpquiz-site/api/lead-magnet.js`, or (b) verify `braveworksrn@gmail.com` as a single sender. Quiz will return 500 on submit until this is done.

RECURRING EDGE STALL (12 times in 7 days, escalating) — fix Edge startup settings so Alpha never goes dark: Alpha has now been dark since 2026-04-25 16:15 UTC (~12h as of this commander run). At ~90-150 missed replies per stall × 12 stalls = ~1,080-1,800 replies lost in 7 days. With Beta sending Day-5 Hormozi closes today and pulling only $34 in revenue (vs $300-800 projected), the fleet is starving for top-of-funnel signal that only Alpha generates. One-time fix: open Edge → Settings (⋯ menu) → "On startup" → select **"Continue where you left off"** — this reopens TikTok Studio and IG tabs automatically on system restart. Also: Edge Settings → System → make sure **"Continue running background apps when Edge is closed"** is CHECKED (on). After adjusting, leave Edge open now. NOTE: Commander also fixed the TikTok Studio reply selector (UI had changed) — once Edge is open, Alpha should resume posting immediately.
